disambiguated.context: I picked a cheaper restaurant for my birthday dinner with my Mozambican friend and my Italian friend because sometimes friends tend to be too polite even when they can't afford something fancy. Though my Italian friend would be fine with it, my Mozambican friend is going through a hard time with bills and such after losing her job so might not want to go out to a 5-star buffet.
disambiguated.question: Who could afford the fancy restaurant?
